## 📦 安装

### npm
```bash
npm install openclaw@{{VERSION}}
```

### 从源码安装
```bash
git clone https://github.com/meisyangb/openclaw-use-Control2.git
cd openclaw-use-Control2
git checkout v{{VERSION}}
npm install
npm run build
```
